name: Royal Romances: Endless Winter Collector's Edition
short_description: Sometimes saving one life can change the fate of many. Can you melt the ice in people's hearts?
detailed_description:
Eternal winter has descended upon the magnificent kingdom once filled with vitality and adventure. Cold and hunger have divided families and heroes, calling out their ugliest traits and draining their last strength. Meanwhile, dragons have returned to dwell among the people once more and help them in their misfortunes. Although some seek to profit from this, for others this is a cause for bringing back old grudges. After decades of mistreatment, the patience of the dragons themselves is wearing thin. Who can restore balance to the lands? A guardian of the forest, an elf, or an inept witch? Gather your wits for an unforgettable love story in this pulse-pounded new Hidden-Object Puzzle Adventure!

This Collector's Edition includes:

💋 Explore a Mystical World!
Traverse through a frozen kingdom once brimming with life and now covered in an eternal winter. Discover breathtaking sceneries and meet unexpected heroes including fauns, elves, and even dragons!

💋 Think twice!
Make critical decisions that influence the fate of characters and kingdoms. Your choices determine the future of the eternal winter – will you be its savior or its perpetual harbinger?

💋 Collectibles and Achievements!
Keep an eye out for myriad collectible items scattered throughout the game. Earn achievements as you advance through the story and prove your prowess in romantic games!

💋 Intricate Puzzles and Mini-Games!
Challenge your mind with a variety of puzzles and relaxing mini-games. Each puzzle solved brings you closer to uncovering the secrets of this mystical world!

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Russian
*languages with full audio support
